paragraphs.source: In this section, we discuss the memory subsystem: the hardware units that move data between computation units. Memory copy instructions are operations that use the memory subsystem, and newer generations feature asynchronous copy instructions (Read the previous article for the asynchrony evolution). Here we focus on the two variants of asynchronous copy instructions: LDGSTS and TMA (Tensor Memory Accelerator).
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In this section, we discuss the memory subsystem: the hardware units that move data between computation units. Memory copy instructions are operations that use the memory subsystem, and newer generations feature asynchronous copy instructions (Read [the previous article](https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/i/174558646/asynchronous-execution) for the asynchrony evolution). Here we focus on the two variants of asynchronous copy instructions: LDGSTS and TMA (Tensor Memory Accelerator).
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In this section, we discuss the memory subsystem: the hardware units that move data between computation units. Memory copy instructions are operations that use the memory subsystem, and newer generations feature asynchronous copy instructions (Read the previous article for the asynchrony evolution). Here we focus on the two variants of asynchronous copy instructions: LDGSTS and TMA (Tensor Memory Accelerator).

pro.text: 本节将探讨内存子系统，即负责在计算单元之间搬运数据的硬件单元。内存拷贝指令负责调用内存子系统执行操作，而新一代架构引入了异步拷贝指令（阅读上一篇文章以了解异步机制的演进）。本文将重点分析异步拷贝指令的两种变体：`LDGSTS` 与张量内存加速器 (`TMA`)。
pro.tokenized_text: 本节将探讨内存子系统，即负责在计算单元之间搬运数据的硬件单元。内存拷贝指令负责调用内存子系统执行操作，而新一代架构引入了异步拷贝指令（阅读[[[LINK_1|上一篇文章]]]以了解异步机制的演进）。本文将重点分析异步拷贝指令的两种变体：`LDGSTS` 与张量内存加速器 (`TMA`)。

applied_terms: Translate 'memory copy instructions' as '内存拷贝指令'.
Translate 'asynchrony evolution' as '异步机制的演进'.

understanding.role_in_article: Acts as an umbrella introduction for the data movement hardware, specifically focusing on asynchronous copy instructions.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Shifts the article's focus from execution unit grouping (Clusters/GPCs) to how data is moved into those units.
understanding.relation_to_next: Sets the scope for the subsequent deep dives into LDGSTS, TMA, and DSMEM.
key_points: The memory subsystem moves data between computation units, with modern architectures relying heavily on asynchronous copy instructions.
The analysis will focus specifically on two asynchronous variants: LDGSTS and TMA.
translation_notes: Translate 'memory copy instructions' as '内存拷贝指令'.
Translate 'asynchrony evolution' as '异步机制的演进'.

issues.description: 译文将“TMA (Tensor Memory Accelerator)”翻译为“张量内存加速器 (TMA)（Tensor Memory Accelerator (TMA)）”，出现了重复的“(TMA)”以及中英文括号嵌套，显得累赘且不符合排版规范。
